name: internal-chat
description: Internal chat plugin that maps terminal percepts to chat effects

performance.name: chat-response-completeness
performance.description: Every terminal chat percept receives a response effect

rewards.name: responded
rewards.when: A response effect is emitted for each percept

environment.name: local-chat-server
environment.description: Terminal chat over local websocket on same machine

actuators.name: chat_effect_append
actuators.description: Append chat responses and task completion effects

sensors.name: terminal_chat_percept
sensors.description: Observe user chat percepts from terminal websocket session
